name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf is a modern indoor golf and sports bar located in midtown Manhattan. The facility utilizes state-of-the-art Trackman technology in custom-built simulator bays to provide an authentic golfing experience, including access to over 200 world-class virtual courses. The venue is designed with a no-dress-code atmosphere, making golf accessible for players of all skill levels, and features a full-service bar with a chef-inspired menu. Alongside golf, it offers other games such as pool and shuffleboard, positioning itself as a social hub that combines practice, play, and entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to industry-leading Trackman technology for accurate data and virtual play at premier PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach
Flexible and social atmosphere with a full-service bar and chef-inspired menu for post-golf dining and socializing
Comprehensive amenities including golf lessons, club fitting, and event hosting options for both individuals and large groups

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service bar with a chef-inspired menu available for guests, including items like Mac & Cheese bites.
Full-service bar with drink packages available for events and regular guests.

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-level dual-radar technology providing accurate data on ball flight, spin rate, swing speed, club path, and attack angle.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility provides club rentals, and they also offer custom club fitting services through Callaway Tour Fitting by Five Iron Golf NYC.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned as permitted. The venue has a full-service bar with a chef-inspired menu available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole round typically takes approximately 60-90 minutes, depending on the course and simulator pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf offers kids' parties and junior clinics, making it suitable for families and younger golfers.
